mapper.insert: INSERT INTO push_record (user_id, announcement_id, push_type, status, push_content) VALUES (#{userId}, #{announcementId}, #{pushType}, #{status}, #{pushContent})
mapper.update: UPDATE push_record SET status = #{status}, error_msg = #{errorMsg}, retry_count = retry_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM push_record ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
